one_line_description: Zoho's team chat app with channels, bots, and workflow integrations, part of the Zoho suite.
auth_summary: The Cliq REST API v2 uses Zoho's standard OAuth 2.0 (register a client in the Zoho API Console, obtain access/refresh tokens with Cliq scopes).
access_notes: Developers register an application self-serve in the Zoho API Console to get client ID/secret; a free Cliq plan exists, so credentials are obtainable without payment. Regional data centers use different token/API endpoints.
api_surface_summary: REST API v2 at cliq.zoho.com/api/v2 covers chats, messages, channels, threads, users, roles, departments, teams, calendars/events, bots, reminders, and file management.
agent_notes: Fetched official v2 REST docs confirming OAuth2 and a wide endpoint list. Zoho hosts official MCP servers (mcp.zoho.com) that include Cliq. Multi-DC (zoho.com/.in/.eu) endpoints add minor integration complexity.
